description: This pipeline merges tables. It takes multiple tables as input, merges them into one table and outputs the resulting table.

70fc2c39-6acd-439e-b316-4aaa355246ca.name: iji-export-table-v2
70fc2c39-6acd-439e-b316-4aaa355246ca.description:
Exports a results table to CSV/XLSX

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

b1e3ccb3-cb70-4e36-affd-c0095f4513de.name: table-add-annotation-columns
b1e3ccb3-cb70-4e36-affd-c0095f4513de.description: Adds column annotations to the table as new columns.

41b9328e-6766-4d1b-83fd-bb7cdbeaab0c.name: table-merge-tables
41b9328e-6766-4d1b-83fd-bb7cdbeaab0c.description:
Merges multiple tables into one table by merging the list of rows. Columns are automatically created if they do not exist.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of multiple data items. If you want to group all data into one output, set the matching strategy to 'Custom' and leave 'Data set matching annotations' empty.
